steps.title: Decode the input and output
steps.content: The notation $f(2)=190$ means that when the input is $2$, the output is $190$. In context, $x$ is minutes after the dive, and $f(x)$ is depth below sea level in meters.

steps.title: Interpret the statement
steps.content: So $f(2)=190$ means that $2$ minutes after the seal dives, its estimated depth is $190$ meters below sea level.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The point $(2{,}190)$ on the graph shows the same input-output interpretation. The answer is C.
